name: Worktrunk
description: Switch, create, or remove git worktrees via worktrunk

actions.title: Worktree: switch / create from default branch
command: cwd=$(jq -r '.workspace_cwd // .focused_pane_cwd' <<<"$HERDR_PLUGIN_CONTEXT_JSON"); exec "$HERDR_BIN_PATH" plugin pane open --plugin "$HERDR_PLUGIN_ID" --entrypoint picker-default --placement split --direction down --cwd "$cwd" --focus

actions.title: Worktree: switch / create from current branch
command: cwd=$(jq -r '.workspace_cwd // .focused_pane_cwd' <<<"$HERDR_PLUGIN_CONTEXT_JSON"); exec "$HERDR_BIN_PATH" plugin pane open --plugin "$HERDR_PLUGIN_ID" --entrypoint picker-current --placement split --direction down --cwd "$cwd" --focus

actions.title: Worktree: remove
command: cwd=$(jq -r '.workspace_cwd // .focused_pane_cwd' <<<"$HERDR_PLUGIN_CONTEXT_JSON"); exec "$HERDR_BIN_PATH" plugin pane open --plugin "$HERDR_PLUGIN_ID" --entrypoint remover --placement split --direction down --cwd "$cwd" --focus
